title: Shaadi.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Shaadi.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shaadi.com family as a Full Stack Developer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shaadi.com:
Shaadi.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com!
